title: Safer Bed
description: Prevents you from clicking on a bed in nether & end (on servers too)
body:
## Safer bed

Protects you from dying in nether/end dimensions after accidentally clicking a bed. 

**Even on servers. It will prevent your right click, so you don't die.**

There is a keybind to toggle the protection (if you actually want the bed to explode), by default it's activated by pressing `0`
